Scanning
Projects folder
Root directory searched for git repos
Scan interval (seconds)
How often the tray icon updates
Search depth
Directory levels deep to search for repos (1 = direct children only)
Git
Stale branch threshold (days)
Repos with no commits in this many days are flagged as stale
Fetch remote before checking unpushed commits
Slower but accurate — makes one network call per repo that has a remote
